steps.title: Fastest path: graph or solve the equation
steps.content:
Type the equation into Desmos as written:
$$\left|x+45\right|=48$$Graph it and use the visible intercept, root, or vertex the question asks for. The requested value is $3$.

steps.title: Split the absolute value
steps.content: $$|x+45|=48$$ means the expression inside the absolute value is either $48$ or $-48$: $$x+45=48 \quad \text{or} \quad x+45=-48.$$

steps.title: Find both solutions
steps.content: The first equation gives $x=3$. The second gives $x=-93$.

steps.title: Choose the positive solution
steps.content: The positive solution is $3$, so the result is correct. The other positive choices do not satisfy $|x+45|=48$.
